parameters.description: Number of items per page (default: 50, max: 1000)
parameters.name: page_size

parameters.description:
filter is an AIP-160 expression. Indexed fields (efficient at any scale):
  actor_id, status. Other fields are not indexed and may be rejected.
Examples:
  actor_id="user_123"
  status=KEY_STATUS_ACTIVE
  actor_id="user_123" AND status=KEY_STATUS_ACTIVE
parameters.name: filter
